missing body part.[body part] 2: the king will sieze the lan[d of his enemy and?] the weapon of the king will lay the land low
missing body part.[...] and nostrils: the land [...]; there will be famine in the land

leg.(rear?) legs: huradu troops will turn against the king
leg.left (fore?)leg: the land of the enemy will perish

missing body part.spleen: the king will not obtain offspring

ear.right: the enemy will devastate and consume the land
ear.left: the king will devastate the enemy's land and consume it

missing body part.[-]KB: the seed-grain of that land will be consumed
missing body part.penis: the weapon of the king will indeed be raised

whole body.stone: many will fall in the land
whole body.piece of wood: ATR YLD, its cattle will be destroyed
whole body.smooth fetus without hair: there will be [...] in the land

face.face like an 'IRN: days of our lord will be shortened, cattle affected
face.nose like a bird's: the gods will destroy the land, something will fly away
face.protruding [-]B from mouth: the enemy will devour the land
face.eyes in forehead: the king will be more powerful than his Huptu-troops

unusual appearance.protruding [-]DR: the Sun/Šapšu will abase that land

unusual appearance.ʿ[--]: the gods will destroy that land
unusual appearance.HR and [-]R: the king will destroy his enemy
